Progress Report On The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account For The Minor, Haley Cheng
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Continued To Nov-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for progress report on the deposit of money into a blocked account.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:24:29 a.m. and concluding 10:27:00 a.m.

Plaintiff Judy Won represented by Craig Murphy, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Michael Rivas not appearing.

The financial institution previously chosen by the parties does not offer blocked accounts.
Plaintiff requests a continuance to deposit funds in another financial institution.

Plaintiff's request to continue is granted.
Court orders matter continued to 11/17/2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for receipt of deposit into blocked account.

The funds shall be deposited in the following institution:

East West Bank
192 Skyline Plaza
Daly City, CA
